backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing bookings with validation, ID generation, storage in a map, and retrieval sorted by timestamp.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report listing implemented features, related files, components, and test IDs for the project.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides one-line summaries for all major frontend components, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base and theme variables defining color palettes and dark mode styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting metadata, root container, and script loader for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with header, booking flow, admin notifications sheet, and all landing page sections.
frontend/src/components/BookingConfirmat: Displays booking confirmation with reference ID and formatted trip summary details.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Booking form with validation, controlled inputs, and backend submission via React Query.
frontend/src/components/FaqSection.tsx: Renders a FAQ section using an accordion UI, mapping predefined questions and answers into expandable items.
frontend/src/components/FooterContact.ts: Displays the site footer with company info, social links, quick links, and dynamic year handling.
frontend/src/components/HighlightsSectio: Shows a grid of service highlights with icons, titles, and descriptions emphasizing key benefits.
frontend/src/components/NotificationsAdm: Admin view that loads and displays bookings in a table with refresh, loading, and error states.
frontend/src/components/RouteInfoSection: Provides route details, stats, and lists of pickup and drop points using styled cards.
frontend/src/components/TrustStrip.tsx: Renders a four‑item trust banner highlighting reliability factors with icons.
frontend/src/components/VehiclePricingSe: Shows vehicle options with pricing, features, and images, highlighting popular choices with badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBookingsWithIds.ts: Fetches all bookings with IDs using the actor, enabling the query only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateBooking.ts: Provides a mutation to create a booking via the actor and extracts the booking ID from the backend response.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth state, login, logout, and identity restoration via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Duplicate booking-fetch hook that retrieves all bookings with IDs when the actor is loaded.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus custom OKLCH color variables and utility classes for a charcoal–saffron theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React, QueryClient, and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering the app.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom theme colors, typography, container settings, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing goals, features, design direction, and outstanding requirements for the cab booking site.
